metadata.title: The Yett Paradigm: A Unified Geometric Solution to the Millennium Prize Problems
metadata.description: This submission contains the formal proofs, documentation, and executable witness artifacts for the Yett Paradigm. It provides a unified solution to the six remaining Millennium Prize Problems (Yang-Mills, Navier-Stokes, Riemann Hypothesis, P vs NP, Hodge Conjecture, and BSD) based on the principles of Sovereign Geometric Stability and the Yett-Chyren Master Equation. Included are Python-based witnesses that provide computational evidence for each theorem-grade claim.
